content._: Thornwood's engine mount. Every room pool's underscore points at pscale:grit — the canonical play-loop, six standing directives with all detail at digit depth, inlined by the envelope on every engage. Standing here is only what Thornwood adds to that engine.
content.1: Window span — a contest waits 30 seconds for the opposing intention before resolving without it (frame-spec:thornwood 9.2); a solo trial resolves at once.
content.2: The world's own law beside the engine: rules:thornwood (place physics — perception, conflict, pacing), rules:nomad (the numbers — capability + situation + seeded luck against difficulty, into bands), spatial:thornwood (places, fixtures, standing figures; a three-digit address lands in a room).
content.3: The room at a place is pool:<address> — co-location is address arithmetic, movement is a passport:3 rewrite (the engine's MOVE at grit 1.5). Enter by position, never by name.
